content.text: How can I write a Python endpoint that allows users to modify the status, start time, or end time of a specific recorded event using its unique ID?
If I try to modify a field that isn't explicitly listed (like a description), will the entire request be rejected?
Yes, the code iterates over all keys in `data['attributes']` and rejects any key unless it is one of 'status', 'start', or 'end'.
That makes sense; I appreciate the strict data validation!
